properties.title: Great Lakes mobility-disease convergence
properties.trigger: High-risk corridor overlap: displacement flow, porous crossing density, and historical disease signal proximity.
properties.recommended_action: Prioritize syndromic screening at informal crossings, mobile lab routing, and corridor-aware contact tracing.

properties.title: Lake Chad cross-border alert
properties.trigger: EVD POE readiness gap intersects with seasonal movement and unmonitored border pressure.
properties.recommended_action: Stage rapid alert desks near lake transport nodes and reconcile event reports with POE readiness scores.

properties.title: Horn corridor watch zone
properties.trigger: Moderate disease signal density near high-friction pastoral and market movement routes.
properties.recommended_action: Monitor sentinel reports and pre-position referral messaging at market-linked crossing points.
